name: feature.documents.agents
description: Documents & Templates agent pack (ADR 0053) — manifest agents whose tools are feature.documents.nodes over the ctx.features.documents surface. document-author drafts a business document from a template; document-reviewer critiques an existing document against its kind's rubric (read-only). Tool-allowlisted to the Documents feature surface only.
author: OpenWOP App

agents.label: Document Author
agents.description: Drafts a business document (SOW/PRD/RFP/Epic-Brief/board-agenda) from a template + parameters, grounded via feature.documents.nodes.generate-from-template over ctx.features.documents.

agents.label: Document Reviewer
agents.description: Critiques an existing business document against its kind's rubric (completeness, clarity, risks) — grounded via feature.documents.nodes.list-documents. Read-only: it reports, it never edits.
